body:
Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to loop back on the [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) deal since I know you'd flagged it as a potential fit for Halfway's climate infrastructure thesis. We've been doing more diligence on their grid orchestration layer and honestly the technical moat looks stronger than we initially gave them credit for, particularly around their load-balancing IP. I'm thinking it might make sense for us to co-lead the Series A rather than one of us going it alone — the check size feels right for a syndicate anyway, and I think our LPs would appreciate the risk distribution given where the broader market is. Would you be up for a call early next week to compare notes on what we've each seen? I have Tuesday afternoon open if that works on your end.

— Lena
